# Ad-hoc

Inspiration count: 12
Inspirations: Ash vs. the Evil Dead (../Inspirations/Ash%20vs%20the%20Evil%20Dead%206c3ea4b72e4e4e6e8f3474bbab490186.md), Doom Patrol (2016) (../Inspirations/Doom%20Patrol%20(2016)%20513936adfeba4a2bad778646bcea5cce.md), Inspiration - Marloth: A Child’s Fairytale World (../Inspirations/Inspiration%20-%20Marloth%20A%20Child%E2%80%99s%20Fairytale%20World%20e35f7fa9c25342108c8c2233027b5bd2.md), Tenkuu Shinpan (../Inspirations/Tenkuu%20Shinpan%20748ff563f82047c68c5bc3e6c8842598.md), Big Trouble in Little China (../Inspirations/Big%20Trouble%20in%20Little%20China%200a1639ebedd74085b350e568bfab2e71.md), Unforgiving - A Northern Hymn (../Inspirations/Unforgiving%20-%20A%20Northern%20Hymn%2096547461fbf64fbfb5f3a64d86e132c0.md), Pride and Prejudice (../Inspirations/Pride%20and%20Prejudice%2013758e628ba2807798bbc04ae550da36.md), Surviving Romance (../Inspirations/Surviving%20Romance%2022858e628ba280fba349c779daae8c37.md), River City Girls (../Inspirations/River%20City%20Girls%2022a58e628ba280688bb9eae58590609a.md), Jeeves and Wooster (../Inspirations/Jeeves%20and%20Wooster%2018658e628ba280b781bfcabd1d05cd5d.md), Untitled (https://www.notion.so/0a76666792964c1bad46a2e5656ab62e?pvs=21), The Matrix (../Inspirations/The%20Matrix%2023058e628ba280c887e8f1e85aa43171.md), Aliens (../Inspirations/Aliens%2028c58e628ba2801a919ce41fb9a52aaa.md)
Notes: Usually full story.  It is hard to maintain ad-hoc traversal indefinitely.  Extended stories need more of a template so the author isn’t continually re-inventing the wheel.
